title: GKB Opticals is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: GKB Opticals is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the GKB Opticals family as a E-commerce Executive in Chennai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About GKB Opticals:
GKB Opticals is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GKB Opticals!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
